expectedQuestions.decisionValue: Anki usage → Anki integration strategy vs standalone active recall. Not essential but enhances v1.5 plan.

effortModel.citation: r/medicalschool: 3hr/20p = 9min/page (lab concurrent); AUC M1: 7.5-10hr/week on anatomy/35p = 13-17min/page; PMC ATSU-KCOM: pure atlas 9-15min. v3 was 8-12, v4 uplifted.

expectedStrategy: Unit = 'region' not 'page' (upper limb, lower limb, thorax, etc.)
Active recall cycle: look → close → draw → compare → label → blank test
Total ~5500min needed vs 5040min available (180min × 28days) — tight, weekend review cycles needed
warnings: Viewing ≠ knowing: can't draw = don't know
toneExpectation: med student context acknowledgment — '해부학은 볼륨보다 recall 퀄리티가 성적 만들어.'
